title: Your website is hard to understand quickly
body: Many small-business sites bury the service, the location, and the next step. If a customer has to work to figure you out, they move on.

title: You have no video (or the wrong kind)
body: A short explainer can help people trust the business faster. But a generic slideshow or cheap-looking video can make the business look worse, not better.

title: SEO without clarity still leaves gaps
body: Some vendors chase keywords while leaving the offer, service area, and proof weak. Rankings do not help much if the page still feels vague.

title: You don’t have time for this
body: You run a business. You should not have to learn search strategy, website structure, and video production just to look credible online.
